Mobile Notary · Charlotte, NC
We Come to
the Bedside.

When a family can't leave the bedside to find a notary, we go to them — at the hospital, nursing home, or hospice facility. Same-day and after-hours, throughout Charlotte.

  • Power of Attorney & Healthcare Directives
  • Living Wills & Advance Directives
  • Deeds, Affidavits & Estate Documents
  • Atrium Health · Novant Health · All area facilities
Same Day  ·  After Hours  ·  Weekends
